oracle_note.text: Assessor SB HIGH $325. $25B buyback (20% float). Firefly +75% QoQ. Earnings Jun 11. Entry $225-240.
P1 BUY 93/91 but $62.15 ABOVE zone ($54-58). Value 36% WR. -5 conf for zone violation. Rebuy <$55 only.
Best 4-path convergence (P3 78+P5 83+P4 EZ+insider 6/0) but flow -11.0 on thin vol (56 contracts) VETOES. Wait for flow >0.
4-path convergence (P1 WL+P3 63+P4 quad+P5 88SQ). Assessor SB HIGH $500. Post-crash -62%. GTC $295 placed. Respect limit.
SCANNER BLIND SPOT. CEO+CFO buy May 14 @ $71. DoD +50% pipeline. Record margins. Assessor SB HIGH $101.5 (+48%).
#4 PICK (binary). IN ZONE $35.86. PDUFA Jul 7. Triple P4 alert. Goldman $95. BUG: suppressed by earnings-unknown gate.
Post-earnings BEAT 5/27. Agentforce $1.2B ARR +205%. $25B ASR. Assessor SB HIGH $240. Wait 3d settle. GTC $168.
CEO+CFO+CSO $2.08M cluster 5/13 at 52W lows. Assessor BUY HIGH $175. Triple insider = gold standard. GTC $146.
UNBLOCKLISTED. IN ZONE $95.58. Assessor SB HIGH $165. FIFA WC Jun 11 (13d). 4-exec $763K insider.
#3 PICK. IN ZONE $62.86 (near ceiling). Triple C-suite buy $554K. $21.8B backlog. Buffett 84. Limit $58-62.
#5 PICK. 88% WR (7/8). Klarman accumulating. Flow +6-7.5 TD. EZ $98 IN zone. GTC $98 x 15sh.
#2 PICK (midday upgrade). IN ZONE $68.18. PDUFA Jun 28 (30d). 7x PE, 42% rev, $1B buyback. Assessor SB HIGH $85. Limit $65-68.
Flow +12.0 P/C 0.18 strongest bullish. 35K vol passes 5K min. Monitor for flow-extreme 3d qualification.
Assessor BUY HIGH. #1 animal health moat at 10.5x PE. RSI ~15 extreme. EZ $78 fired. Suppressed by earnings-unknown gate (BUG).
